title: Dashboard enhancements and bug fixes
body:
* **Legacy dashboard color palette setting removed**: The workspace setting for the legacy dashboard color palette has been removed, as legacy dashboards are no longer supported. AI/BI workspace-level color palettes remain available and unchanged.
* **Genie Space descriptions on dashboards**: Authors can now add descriptions to Genie Spaces embedded in dashboards. See [Edit your dashboard's Genie Space description](/aws/en/dashboards/genie-spaces#genie-space-description).
* **Collapsible visualization editor**: The visualization editor is now collapsible when editing draft dashboards.
* **Field comments on hover**: When configuring visualizations on a draft dashboard, hovering over a field now displays the comment associated with the underlying field.
* **Waterfall chart total bar**: The waterfall chart editor now includes a **Show total** toggle that renders a cumulative total bar alongside incremental change bars.
* **Simplified scheduling UI**: The dashboard scheduling interface has been redesigned for easier setup and navigation. See [Create a schedule](/aws/en/dashboards/share/schedule-subscribe#create-schedule).
* **Advanced cells in pivot tables**: Pivot tables now support advanced cells including image, HTML, JSON, and link. See [Pivot table configuration](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/visualizations/tables#pivot-table-configuration).
* **Parameters in custom calculations**: Custom calculations now support parameters. See [Use parameters in custom calculations](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/data-modeling/custom-calculations#parameters).
* **Annotation render loop fix**: Fixed an infinite render loop on some dashboards with charts that have annotations.
* **Loading and no-data state display**: Visualizations now correctly distinguish between loading and no-data states, and disable the animation slider while data loads.
* **Dot notation in field names**: Visualization expressions now correctly handle field names that contain dots.

ref_links.text: Edit your dashboard's Genie Space description
